summary: Record the bounded production web build after the M4 AI provider, conversation, persistence, readiness, and panel units.

decisions.decision: Record the production build as evidence for the committed AI foundations while retaining the explicit pending runtime wiring and hosted acceptance caveats in the README and prior entries.
decisions.rationale: A successful bundle proves the additions compile and package; it does not prove provider credentials, network behavior, or editor diff integration in a clean host.

testEvidence.criterion: The committed M4 AI foundations compile and bundle in the production web target.
testEvidence.test: Run the production build once after the bounded AI panel unit.

red.outcome: RED: no failed build was observed; this red slot records that the production build was not yet run before verification.

green.outcome: GREEN: tsc exited 0; Vite transformed 226 modules and completed the production build in 360ms.

questions: This build does not close the hosted browser walkthrough, owner similarity gate, or C10 runtime/provider-context integration.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
